uploads.title: I Put Half My Emergency Fund Into a 9% Crypto "Stablecoin" — Then Bailed
uploads.description:
A confession from Ep 3: one host moved half his emergency fund into MicroStrategy's "Stretch" (STRC) chasing a 9% yield, then sold before the de-peg.
